title: Stronger Iron Golems
description: This mod make iron golems much stronger.
body:
## This mod makes iron golems much stronger by :
- Giving any player/mob that hit an iron golem a strong levitation effect (he will fly very high very high then he will fall so he takes fall damage and die)
- Giving any player/mob that the iron golem hit a strong levitation effect

Levitation effect is the effect that shulkers give to players.
